name: Okta: Privileged Users with Non-Active Status (Indirect)
description: Finds users whose status is not ACTIVE and hold privileged role assignments through group membership, including deactivated, suspended, or provisioning-incomplete accounts.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_MemberOf]->(:Okta_Group)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.status <> "ACTIVE"
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
